{{Infobox concept
| name = Truegold
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Truegold Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Truegold represents the highest tier within the [[Gold]] advancement stage of the [[sacred arts]], situated above [[Highgold]] and below the realm of [[Underlord]]. Reaching this level requires immense skill or luck, as the progression between stages is significantly more difficult than the transitions seen in lower ranks like [[Copper]] or [[Iron]]. Achieving Truegold status signifies a practitioner has gained complete control over the [[Remnant]] in their core, often resulting in a sense of spiritual completeness. While Truegolds are powerful enough to serve as squad leaders, clan chiefs, or elite elders, they remain vastly inferior to Underlords, who possess unique abilities such as [[soulfire]]. The gap between Truegold and the next stage is so immense that only one in ten thousand practitioners successfully advances. Because of this difficulty, Truegolds are relatively rare and highly respected; however, they can still be overwhelmed by the superior power of an [[Underlord]] or a [[Monarch]]. In combat, Truegolds are formidable individually and can be quite crafty, though they lack the transcendent capabilities of those in higher realms.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Truegold represents a specific rank of [[Gold]] that sits above the level of [[Highgold]]. As a stage of advancement, it serves as a power stage that functions as the realm preceding [[Underlord]]. This peak stage can be attained by [[Iron]] practitioners who are either particularly gifted or fortunate. Ultimately, Truegold is recognized as a title or status, a rank noted by [[Jai Long]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Truegold]] is a rank of [[Gold]] above [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Truegold]] is a stage of advancement.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Truegold]] is a realm preceding [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11">''Soulsmith'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Truegold]] is a power stage.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Truegold]] is a peak stage that can be reached by gifted or lucky [[Iron]] practitioners.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Truegold]] is a rank or title.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Truegold]] is a rank or status mentioned by [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Truegold represents a specific level of power and rank within the world. It is a stage of advancement that the [[Fishers]] are capable of guiding [[Lindon]] toward, though it remains a rank that both [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] have yet to achieve. Within the [[Jai clan]], this status is held by certain elders. Additionally, Truegold serves as a measurement of strength for [[sacred beasts]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Truegold]] is a level of power/rank.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Truegold]] is a stage of advancement that the [[Fishers]] could take [[Lindon]] to.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Truegold]] is a stage or rank that [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] have not yet reached.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] has [[Truegold elders]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Truegold]] is a strength rating for [[sacred beasts]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Truegold represents a specific stage of power and [[madra]] potency that is often characterized by craftiness. While most assassins only reach this level at best, it is a rank held by individuals such as [[Jai Long]] and Pai Ren. Within the progression of [[sacred artists]], it is a level that [[Lindon]] might achieve ten years after reaching [[Highgold]]. Despite its significance, [[Yerin]] considers Truegold to be the least impressive rank among the [[sacred artists]] she has encountered.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Most assassins are [[Truegold]] at best.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Truegolds are a stage of power that can be crafty.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Truegold]] is a stage of power held by [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Truegold]] is a type of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5">''Skysworn'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Pai Ren is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Truegold]] is a rank [[Lindon]] might reach ten years after [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Truegold]] is a rank of [[madra]] potency.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Truegold]] is a level or rank that [[Yerin]] considers the least of the [[sacred artists]] she has met.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17">''Skysworn'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Truegolds are powerful presences that are sent to [[Ghostwater]] every ten years for the purpose of training. While a young woman with [[Blood Shadow]] is identified as a Truegold, it is noted that older practitioners of this rank are often stronger due to their more practiced techniques, though Lowgolds can still defeat them. This rank is also one that the oracle was raised to, and the [[Highgold]] holds this status as well. During certain events, Truegolds that resemble a cross between humans and [[dragons]] flank the [[Underlady]], and their distinct auras can be felt flaring in the distance.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Truegold]] is a powerful presence approaching the town.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1">''Ghostwater'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The young woman with [[Blood Shadow]] is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Truegolds are sent to [[Ghostwater]] every ten years for training.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Lowgolds can defeat Truegolds.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Old Truegolds are often stronger than young Truegolds because their techniques are more practiced.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Underlady]] is flanked by Truegolds who look like a cross between humans and [[dragons]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Truegold]] [[aura]] flared in the distance.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Highgold]] is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Truegold]] is a rank the oracle was raised to.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|As a rank within the [[Skysworn]], Truegold serves as the stage immediately preceding [[Underlord]], offering a transformation of body and spirit that surpasses advancement to [[Highgold]]. During the conflict, Truegolds were seen defending a ship through specialized techniques and defensive [[scripts]], demonstrating their ability to stand up to Underlords. One such combatant, clad in green armor with bright yellow spikes sweeping from her shoulders, fought enemies using a [[sword]] in each hand. While [[Akura Charity]] observed that the [[Seishen Kingdom]] had trained their Truegolds effectively, [[Yerin]] worked to reach the peak of this rank so that [[Lindon]] could consume a remaining elixir.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">11</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Truegold]] is a rank within the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] can drink the remaining elixir once [[Yerin]] reaches the peak of [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Truegold]] is a stage that precedes [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Truegold]] in green armor faced their enemies with a [[sword]] in each of her hands and bright yellow spikes sweeping forward from her shoulders.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] cycled her [[Truegold]] [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Truegolds and children of large clans are permitted into the hospitals within the capital city.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Advancement to [[Underlord]] is superior to advancing to [[Highgold]] as it remakes the body and spirit.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Truegolds were maintaining defensive [[scripts]] or using techniques to defend the ship.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Truegolds can stand up to Underlords.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] was always a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]] noted the [[Seishen Kingdom]] had trained their Truegolds well.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Truegolds must harvest [[aura]] to reach their stage.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Truegolds were present in the room watching the fight.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Truegold]] is a stage of power present among [[Sha Siris]]'s guests.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Truegold]] is a rank [[Lindon]] held when he overcame the [[Seishen Underlords]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Truegold]] is a level of dreadbeast [[Lindon]] can drain.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Five times as many Truegolds and Highgolds were watching from further back.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]]'s spiritual sense felt more like a [[Truegold]] due to the suppression.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The most advanced experts in the region are [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A [[Truegold]]-level dreadbeast could be dangerous to the refugees.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Truegolds were using script-circles and other tools to care for [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Truegolds are entities that can be fought when dealing with a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Truegolds are heading toward the fight.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] once fought a [[Truegold]] who posed a threat to her.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] advanced to the limit of [[Truegold]] using [[Heaven's Drop]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Some people in the Training [[Hall]] are sixty-year-old Truegolds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Truegold]] is a rank of fighter.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Truegolds were fighting [[Bloody Thorn]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Truegolds are a type of character who attacked [[Kelsa]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“Still a long way to go before Truegold,” he said, voice dry.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“How often do Lowgolds defeat Truegolds?”<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Perfect. That’s exactly what they deserve. Some of these people are sixty-year-old Truegolds!”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
